title: Welcome to My Minimalist Blog
content: This is my very first post! I'm building this blog with FastAPI and Pydantic. It's clean, fast, and 100% black and white. Today I learned how to use Jinja2 templates and how to handle JSON storage. It's much simpler than I thought!
author: Jaimz

title: Why I Chose FastAPI for this Project
content: FastAPI is amazing because it's built on modern Python 3.8+ type hints. It's extremely fast and handles all the validation for you using Pydantic. Plus, the syntax is very clean and easy to understand for beginners like me.
author: Jaimz
